description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its textured leatherette upper and elegant silver hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. Carry this with dressed down outfits and matching accessories. Floral textured leatherette upper with a metallic brand badge on the front and contrast stitch detailing Two handles with rivet detailing A magnetic button flap over the compartments Two main zippered compartments with a mobile pouch in the first compartment and a zippered pocket on the second compartment Zippered pocket on the back Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
